title: chrysopsis mariana
intro: Chrysopsis mariana, also known as Eastern Bay or Bay Goldenrod, is a perennial plant native to the eastern regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chrysopsis mariana include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Chrysopsis mariana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots can also be used in traditional medicine to create a decoction or poultice.
